headline: Repligen, AdaptHealth, and IQVIA Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the April PPI report showed wholesale inflation accelerating to 6% annually, with service-sector prices rising at their fastest pace in four years.
